channel.title: Rants on Zymacs
channel.description: Recent content in Rants on Zymacs

item.title: On the end of Android
item.description:
On the end of Android

The loss of latent freedom

I’m just Zymacs. This’ll be the first opinionated post. I’m grategul that I get to have them read by you, these my opinions. And by all they reach. Ain’t a famous person. I don’t think anyone has to, to voice their opinion on matters they care about. I thought twice about posting this, then thrice, then here you are, reading this.
